The Shift

Swaioh is an AI-first GTM company built to turn sales activity into a scalable growth engine. We analyze the conversations, behaviors, and buying patterns behind your best customers, then engineer repeatable acquisition systems that consistently put you in front of more companies with the same intent, pain points, and buying signals.

Services

Swaioh helps B2B teams
through 2 main service lines

Every system is designed for a specific type of company depending on their current situation.

Everything built inside of your systems

Designed for companies that are entering a new markets, launching a new product, or scaling what already works.

Book a Strategy Call â

Entering a new market

You have a working business but you're expanding into new verticals, geographies, or customer segments. You need to know which ones are worth committing resources to before you hire around them.

Entering a new market

You have a working business but you're expanding into new verticals, geographies, or customer segments. You need to know which ones are worth committing resources to before you hire around them.

Launching a new product

You have existing customers but this product opens a different buyer or segment entirely. You need signal on whether the market responds before you build a full sales motion around it.

Launching a new product

Going beyond referrals

Your pipeline has been mostly inbound or word-of-mouth and it's worked. But you need a predictable channel to scale consistently. We'll build you one specifically for that, if you qualify.

About Us

Your results timeline
what happens after onboarding

Your results timeline
what happens after onboarding

Clear structure on what happens in every step of the journey.

Clear structure on what happens in every step of the journey.

Week 1 & 2: Define & Setup

We align on your ICP, map your accounts, build your messaging, and connect the tools. By the end of Week 2, every core system is live and ready for launch.

Week 1 & 2: Define & Setup

We align on your ICP, map your accounts, build your messaging, and connect the tools. By the end of Week 2, every core system is live and ready for launch.

Weeks 3 & 4: Create & Launch

First channels go live. Real market data starts flowing into the intelligence layer. Your growth hypothesis gets tested against actual buyer response in real time.

Weeks 3 & 4: Create & Launch

First channels go live. Real market data starts flowing into the intelligence layer. Your growth hypothesis gets tested against actual buyer response in real time.

Month 2 : Amplify & Convert

Top-performing positioning scales. Underperforming angles get replaced by what the data says works. Additional channels layer on.

Latest blogs and case studies

Latest blogs and case studies

Perspectives on pipeline generation, AI agents, and GTM playbooks we use daily, along with the real results theyâve driven for our clients.

Perspectives on pipeline generation, AI agents, and GTM playbooks we use daily, along with the real results theyâve driven for our clients.

How to Clone Your Best Customers : GTM Playbook

Most teams rebuild their ICP from scratch every quarter. New list, new filters, new debate about which industries to target. Meanwhile, the answer has been sitting in their CRM the entire time. The companies already paying you are the only ICP that matters. They converted. They paid. They stayed. That's a stronger buying signal than any demographic filter you'll ever apply to a database. Here's the system to turn your closed won deals into a repeatable prospecting engine.

Jun 22, 2026

How to Build a Pipeline Machine That Compounds

Most B2B companies have a pipeline problem that isn't actually a pipeline problem. It's a funnel problem. They're running one or two stages in isolation, usually outbound and conversion, and wondering why results are unpredictable. The companies generating consistent pipeline aren't doing more outbound. They're running a full funnel where every stage feeds the next one.

Jun 22, 2026

How to Map Your TAM: The 2026 GTM Playbook

Most GTM teams don't have a real TAM map. What they have is a few exports from ZoomInfo or Apollo that someone pulled together once and never touched again. Reps end up building their own lists from scratch every time they want to run outbound, which means every rep is working off a different definition of what a good account even looks like.

May 2, 2026

Securing 4 key healthcare enterprise clients and driving $512K in new ARR

CareForce AI develops AI-powered solutions for healthcare organizations, helping providers improve patient care and operational efficiency through predictive analytics, real-time monitoring, and automation. As the company expanded, it needed a reliable way to connect with healthcare organizations and establish itself within a highly specialized and relationship-driven industry.
